Name: Average time from Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission to Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Total time between Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission and Manuscript Export Succeeded
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Minimum time it takes Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission to be followed by Plagiarism Originality Report Completed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'

Name: Average time until Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission is performed after SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission'

Name: Total resolution time of Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission in variants that include Immediate Reject Decision from the Checklist
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and the end of case where activity 'Immediate Reject Decision from the Checklist occurs

Name: Time from Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission to SW-Checklist Completed in complex reviewer assignment variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Average time for Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission when occurring multiple times consecutively within the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time between Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission and SW-Initial Reviewer Selection in variants leading to SW-EIC Major Revision
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Total time from Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission to SW-Awaiting AE Assignment in rejected manuscript variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Elapsed time between Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission and the first occurrence of SW-AE Assign Reviewers in multi-round revision cases
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Time of Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission relative to the start of the process in variants with high performance duration (>10 million seconds)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission and the end of the case

Name: Average waiting time to Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission after Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation in resubmission pathways
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission'

Name: Total time it takes SW-Reviewer Agreed to occur after Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission in accepted manuscript variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time from Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission to Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation in multi-revision trajectories
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Cycle Time of Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission measured from its first to last occurrence in cases with repeated co-author account creation events
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission'
